data.body:
Goal:
Once native execution_plan support exists, instantiate the real execution_plan knot for the grooming-to-execution spec, attach the reviewed slice hierarchy beneath it with provenance edges, and reconcile the existing slice-3 work knots into that tree.

Verification:
1. Use kno ls/show/edge list in Foolery to confirm the execution_plan knot exists with the spec tag and slice:all tag.
2. Confirm the generated Slice 1 and Slice 2 work knots plus the existing Slice 3 work knots are linked to the execution_plan knot with planned_by edges and expected parent_of/blocked_by relationships inside the work tree.
3. Confirm the existing April 13 Slice 3 knots are reparented under the reviewed Slice 3 grouping parents rather than recreated.

Constraints:
- The execution_plan knot must be of the native execution_plan type, not a work knot.
- Do not use parent_of from the plan knot to the generated work knots; use planned_by for provenance and keep hierarchy among work knots only.
- Reuse the literal spec tag spec:foolery/Specs/Spec - Grooming to Execution Plan.md and the agreed slice tags.
data.title: Create Foolery execution_plan knot and work tree
